visual_summary: An agrarian Martian settlement characterized by elevated dwellings and metal shaft architecture. The landscape features high-ground residential structures situated amidst wide transit roads, specifically broad white turnpikes, suggesting an organized civilization integrated into the wild Martian terrain.
layout_notes: Elevated farmhouses; wide white turnpike transit roads; agrarian layout on high ground.
lighting: Bright, open vistas; domestic and hospitable lighting.
constraints: Must maintain a sense of organized civilization amidst the wild.
Residential structures are positioned on high ground.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural materials beyond "metal shaft" and "elevated" are undefined.
Exact geographic relationship between the farmhouses and the turnpikes is not specified.
